mission_metadata.title: Operation: Silent Wake
mission_metadata.description: Navigate a hostile naval exclusion zone while managing system degradation and escalating tactical pressure.

turns.title: Ghost in the Static
turns.context: Strategic entry into the exclusion zone. Minor sensor ghosts appearing on the AAW Radar. Identify and clear interference.

cyber_officer.name: Frequency Hopping
cyber_officer.desc: Rapidly cycle comms frequencies to bypass localized jamming.

cyber_officer.name: Firewall Reset
cyber_officer.desc: Hard-reboot the perimeter defense layers.

cyber_officer.name: Data Log Audit
cyber_officer.desc: Analyze packet headers for signs of spoofing.

air_officer.name: CAP Launch
air_officer.desc: Deploy Combat Air Patrol to maintain visual range.

air_officer.name: Passive Scan
air_officer.desc: Search for heat signatures without emitting radar pulses.

air_officer.name: Signal Flare
air_officer.desc: Launch magnesium flares for visual signaling.

naval_officer.name: Standard Route
naval_officer.desc: Maintain current heading and speed.

naval_officer.name: Increase Speed
naval_officer.desc: Push engines to 20 knots to clear the sector.

naval_officer.name: Formation Delta
naval_officer.desc: Tighten fleet perimeter for overlapping radar cover.

submarine_officer.name: Shallow Dive
submarine_officer.desc: Submerge to 50 meters to avoid visual detection.

submarine_officer.name: Towed Array Deploy
submarine_officer.desc: Unspool sonar cable for long-range listening.

submarine_officer.name: Active Ping
submarine_officer.desc: Emit high-energy sonar pulse to map surroundings.

turns.title: The Approaching Storm
turns.context: Weather degrading. NAV_SENSORS showing 15% deviation. Stability is priority.

cyber_officer.name: Weather Filter
cyber_officer.desc: Apply digital noise reduction to sensor feeds.

cyber_officer.name: Signal Boost
cyber_officer.desc: Increase gain on long-range antenna arrays.

cyber_officer.name: System Bypass
cyber_officer.desc: Reroute power around damaged relay nodes.

air_officer.name: Low Altitude Flight
air_officer.desc: Fly below the cloud deck for better visibility.

air_officer.name: RTB
air_officer.desc: Return to Base for safety during peak storm.

air_officer.name: Search Pattern B
air_officer.desc: Systematic grid search of the immediate area.

naval_officer.name: Heavy Sea Maneuver
naval_officer.desc: Adjust heading to take waves at 45 degrees.

naval_officer.name: Stabilizers On
naval_officer.desc: Deploy hydraulic fins to reduce ship roll.

naval_officer.name: Full Stop
naval_officer.desc: Kill engines to avoid collision in zero visibility.

submarine_officer.name: Below Thermocline
submarine_officer.desc: Dive deep to hide under temperature layers.

submarine_officer.name: Snorkel Depth
submarine_officer.desc: Maintain shallow depth for engine ventilation.

submarine_officer.name: Silent Running
submarine_officer.desc: Switch to battery power to reduce acoustic trace.

turns.title: Unidentified Contact
turns.context: A surface contact refuses to ID on COMMS. Threat level: High.

cyber_officer.name: Decrypt Hail
cyber_officer.desc: Brute-force the non-standard signal encryption.

cyber_officer.name: Jamming Pulse
cyber_officer.desc: Blanket the target in high-frequency noise.

cyber_officer.name: Trace Origin
cyber_officer.desc: Triangulate the target's broadcast location.

air_officer.name: Warning Shot
air_officer.desc: Fire 20mm cannons across the target's bow.

air_officer.name: Visual ID Flyby
air_officer.desc: Low-altitude pass to confirm target markings.

air_officer.name: Drop Sonobuoy
air_officer.desc: Deploy acoustic sensor near the target.

naval_officer.name: Hail on 16
naval_officer.desc: Transmit challenge on international frequency.

naval_officer.name: Ready Deck Gun
naval_officer.desc: Train the 5-inch gun on the target.

naval_officer.name: Shield HVU
naval_officer.desc: Position ship between target and High Value Unit.

submarine_officer.name: Shadow Contact
submarine_officer.desc: Follow target within its acoustic blind spot.

submarine_officer.name: ID Check
submarine_officer.desc: Cross-reference acoustic signature with database.

submarine_officer.name: Torpedo Preset
submarine_officer.desc: Flood tubes and set depth for engagement.

cyber_officer.name: Sandbox Isolation
cyber_officer.desc: Quarantine suspected malware to virtual nodes.

cyber_officer.name: Purge Buffers
cyber_officer.desc: Clear volatile memory to remove resident threats.

cyber_officer.name: Hardened Logic
cyber_officer.desc: Lock down kernel access to critical systems.

air_officer.name: Relay Comms
air_officer.desc: Act as a satellite link for the fleet.

air_officer.name: Guard Frequency
air_officer.desc: Monitor distress bands for SOS signals.

air_officer.name: Electronic Escort
air_officer.desc: Provide ECM cover for shipborne sensors.

naval_officer.name: Manual Navigation
naval_officer.desc: Steer using direct mechanical linkages.

naval_officer.name: Optical Bearings
naval_officer.desc: Use the bridge bridge telescope for positioning.

naval_officer.name: Emergency Turn
naval_officer.desc: Hard rudder to port to avoid phantom obstacle.

submarine_officer.name: Cut External Links
submarine_officer.desc: Sever data tethers to prevent cross-infection.

submarine_officer.name: Internal Diagnostic
submarine_officer.desc: Run full integrity scan on sonar computers.

submarine_officer.name: Surface Comms
submarine_officer.desc: Rise to deploy antenna for external clean-boot.

cyber_officer.name: Decoy Signals
cyber_officer.desc: Generate phantom radar returns.

cyber_officer.name: Logic Bomb
cyber_officer.desc: Infect incoming missile guidance via radio.

cyber_officer.name: Sensor Fusion
cyber_officer.desc: Combine all feeds into one tactical map.

air_officer.name: Scramble Interceptors
air_officer.desc: Immediate launch for fleet defense.

air_officer.name: Chaff Cloud
air_officer.desc: Deploy aluminum strips to confuse radar.

air_officer.name: Counter-Exocet
air_officer.desc: AAM engagement of incoming missiles.

naval_officer.name: Zig-Zag
naval_officer.desc: Unpredictable course changes to evade fire.

naval_officer.name: Flank Speed
naval_officer.desc: Maximum turbine output (30+ knots).

naval_officer.name: Engage Targets
naval_officer.desc: Fire deck guns at surface threats.

submarine_officer.name: Launch Decoys
submarine_officer.desc: Eject acoustic noisemakers to lure torpedoes.

submarine_officer.name: Emergency Deep
submarine_officer.desc: Maximum dive rate to escape blast radius.

submarine_officer.name: Counter-Slam
submarine_officer.desc: Launch sub-surface to air missile.

cyber_officer.name: Coolant Redirect
cyber_officer.desc: Priority cooling to server racks.

cyber_officer.name: Power Cycle
cyber_officer.desc: Brief shutdown to prevent hardware melt.

cyber_officer.name: Redundant Path
cyber_officer.desc: Switch processing to auxiliary CPU.

air_officer.name: Orbiting High
air_officer.desc: Conserve fuel at 30,000 feet.

air_officer.name: Glide Descent
air_officer.desc: Engines to idle to reduce heat signature.

air_officer.name: Refuel Mid-air
air_officer.desc: Extend flight time via tanker support.

naval_officer.name: Damage Control
naval_officer.desc: Repair crews deployed to radar deck.

naval_officer.name: Fire Suppress
naval_officer.desc: Activate Halon gas in electronics bay.

naval_officer.name: Shore Bulkhead
naval_officer.desc: Reinforce hull plates after stress fractures.

submarine_officer.name: Level Trim
submarine_officer.desc: Adjust ballast for perfectly level hover.

submarine_officer.name: Ballast Vent
submarine_officer.desc: Flush tanks to change buoyancy profile.

submarine_officer.name: Pressure Check
submarine_officer.desc: Monitor hull for micro-fractures.

turns.title: The Silent Hunter
turns.context: Sub-surface ping detected. SENSORS at Red.

cyber_officer.name: Acoustic Analysis
cyber_officer.desc: Isolate engine noise from biologicals.

cyber_officer.name: Filter Cavitation
cyber_officer.desc: Remove propeller bubble noise from feed.

cyber_officer.name: Pattern Match
cyber_officer.desc: Identify sub class via sound signature.

air_officer.name: Dipping Sonar
air_officer.desc: Helicopter-based sub-surface search.

air_officer.name: Depth Charge
air_officer.desc: Deploy anti-sub explosives.

air_officer.name: MAD Scan
air_officer.desc: Search for metal hull magnetic anomalies.

naval_officer.name: ASW Maneuver
naval_officer.desc: Perform 'Sprint and Drift' search.

naval_officer.name: Active Ping
naval_officer.desc: Force target to reveal position.

naval_officer.name: Engine Silence
naval_officer.desc: Kill all machinery to listen better.

submarine_officer.name: Bottoming
submarine_officer.desc: Rest on the seafloor to remain invisible.

submarine_officer.name: Cold Pipe Flow
submarine_officer.desc: Reduce thermal output of the reactor.

submarine_officer.name: Stealth Mode
submarine_officer.desc: Deploy acoustic masking coating.

turns.title: Dead Reckoning
turns.context: GPS Lost. NAV systems in ORANGE.

cyber_officer.name: Satellite Re-link
cyber_officer.desc: Search for alternative comms birds.

cyber_officer.name: Inertial Sync
cyber_officer.desc: Calibrate position via gyros.

cyber_officer.name: Clock Correction
cyber_officer.desc: Fix time-drift in local servers.

air_officer.name: Horizon Sight
air_officer.desc: Fly high to find landmarks visually.

air_officer.name: Star Nav
air_officer.desc: Use celestial bodies for course fixing.

air_officer.name: Guide Ship
air_officer.desc: Airborne eyes for the bridge team.

naval_officer.name: Sextant Use
naval_officer.desc: Manual star-sights for navigation.

naval_officer.name: Dead Reckon
naval_officer.desc: Calculate position via speed and time.

naval_officer.name: Anchor Watch
naval_officer.desc: Monitor drift in shallow waters.

submarine_officer.name: Bathymetric Map
submarine_officer.desc: Navigate via seafloor topography.

submarine_officer.name: Current Drift
submarine_officer.desc: Adjust for underwater water flow.

submarine_officer.name: Periscope Rise
submarine_officer.desc: Visual confirmation of surface shore.

cyber_officer.name: Emergency Protocol
cyber_officer.desc: Execute pre-programmed fallback orders.

cyber_officer.name: Mesh Network
cyber_officer.desc: P2P data sharing between nearby hulls.

cyber_officer.name: Burner Channel
cyber_officer.desc: Use unprotected, high-gain radio frequency.

air_officer.name: Hand Signals
air_officer.desc: Communicate between cockpits visually.

air_officer.name: Flare Pattern
air_officer.desc: Coded signals using colored flares.

air_officer.name: Wing Dip
air_officer.desc: Simple 'Follow Me' aerial maneuver.

naval_officer.name: Aldis Lamp
naval_officer.desc: High-intensity flashing light signals.

naval_officer.name: Flag Hoist
naval_officer.desc: Raise physical signal flags.

naval_officer.name: Megaphone
naval_officer.desc: Acoustic shouting to nearby ships.

submarine_officer.name: U-Telephone
submarine_officer.desc: Acoustic voice pulses through water.

submarine_officer.name: Release Buoy
submarine_officer.desc: Float a radio beacon to the surface.

submarine_officer.name: Timed Rise
submarine_officer.desc: Surface at exactly 12:00 for orders.

turns.title: The Extraction
turns.context: Tide window closing. Final dash to exit.

cyber_officer.name: Overclock CPU
cyber_officer.desc: Max processing for final extraction.

cyber_officer.name: Final Encrypt
cyber_officer.desc: Seal all data for transport.

cyber_officer.name: Delete Logs
cyber_officer.desc: Wipe all evidence of presence.

air_officer.name: Full Burn
air_officer.desc: Maximum afterburner speed.

air_officer.name: Cover Retreat
air_officer.desc: Mask the fleet's acoustic exit.

air_officer.name: Last Man Out
air_officer.desc: Final sensor sweep before RTB.

naval_officer.name: Max Revolutions
naval_officer.desc: Turbines to the redline.

naval_officer.name: Tight Turn
naval_officer.desc: High-speed course change.

naval_officer.name: All Guns Free
naval_officer.desc: Suppressive fire in all directions.

submarine_officer.name: Cavitate to Surface
submarine_officer.desc: Speed over silence to reach top.

submarine_officer.name: Blow Ballast
submarine_officer.desc: Emergency rise using all air.

submarine_officer.name: Speed Run
submarine_officer.desc: Full battery drain for 40 knots.
